title: Python 3.15.0a8, 3.14.4 and 3.13.13 are out!

title: Python 3.12.13, 3.11.15 and 3.10.20 are now available!

title: The Python Insider Blog Has Moved!
content: Python Insider now lives at blog.python.org, backed by a Git repository. All 307 posts from the Blogger era have been migrated, and old URLs redirect automatically.

title: Join the Python Security Response Team!
content: The Python Security Response Team now has an approved public governance document (PEP 811) and is welcoming new members.
